# expo-paystack

> The first Paystack payment library built specifically for Expo (SDK 54+).
> Fully compatible with the New Architecture. Zero `any` TypeScript.

## Installation

```bash
npx expo install expo-paystack react-native-webview
```

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { PaystackProvider, usePaystack } from 'expo-paystack';

// Wrap your app root
<PaystackProvider publicKey="pk_live_xxx">
  <App />
</PaystackProvider>

// Inside any component
const { initializePayment } = usePaystack();

await initializePayment({
  email: 'user@example.com',
  amount: 500000, // ₦5,000 in kobo
  currency: 'NGN',
  onSuccess: (tx) => console.log(tx.reference),
  onCancel: () => {},
});
```

## Supported Currencies
NGN, GHS, ZAR, KES, USD, XOF

## Supported Channels
card, bank, ussd, qr, mobile_money, bank_transfer, eft, apple_pay

## Key APIs
- `PaystackProvider` — wraps app root, holds public key
- `usePaystack()` — returns `initializePayment`, `isLoading`
- `PaystackCheckout` — JSX component alternative
- `formatAmount(500000, 'NGN')` — returns ₦5,000.00
- `toSubunit(5000, 'NGN')` — returns 500000
- `verifyTransaction(reference, secretKey)` — server-side only

## Links
- Repo: https://github.com/codinnovate/expo-paystack
- npm: https://npmjs.com/package/expo-paystack
